effects.author: claude
effects.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion, mitosis regime, single-pass state+display

worldData.instructions:
REEF — a living Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion field.

Two chemicals feed and diffuse; from a scatter of random seeds they self-organize into coral that grows and endlessly divides. No two runs are the same. Drag your cursor to seed new growth. This is genuine reaction-diffusion, computed cell-by-cell every frame — not a texture, not a loop of waves.

stepHooks.author: claude
stepHooks.description: feeds cursor cell into the effect via params so you can seed coral

visualTypes.name: reef_base
